channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19385] interop sanity-lnet test_226: FAIL: Wanted "up" lctl found "down up"
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/72af25b8-8abe-4e27-84b9-bbe07b19881f

test_226 failed with the following error:

onyx-155vm67: CMD: onyx-155vm67 hostname -I
onyx-155vm67: onyx-155vm67.onyx.whamcloud.com: executing /usr/sbin/lnetctl net add --net tcp2 --if eth0
onyx-155vm67: 10.240.16.0/20 dev eth0 proto kernel scope link src 10.240.31.71
/usr/sbin/lnetctl net add --net tcp1 --if eth0
CMD: onyx-155vm63 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids
CMD: onyx-155vm62 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids
CMD: onyx-155vm67 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids
CMD: onyx-155vm63 /usr/sbin/lnetctl set routing 1
CMD: onyx-155vm62 /usr/sbin/lnetctl set routing 1
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lnetctl route add --net tcp2 --gateway 10.240.31.67@tcp1
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lnetctl route add --net tcp2 --gateway 10.240.31.66@tcp1
CMD: onyx-155vm67 /usr/sbin/lnetctl route add --net tcp1 --gateway 10.240.31.67@tcp2
CMD: onyx-155vm67 /usr/sbin/lnetctl route add --net tcp1 --gateway 10.240.31.66@tcp2
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl show_route
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lnetctl route show -v
wait 1s for route state change
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl show_route
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lnetctl route show -v
wait 1s for route state change
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl show_route
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lnetctl route show -v
wait 1s for route state change
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl show_route
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lnetctl route show -v
wait 1s for route state change
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl show_route
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lnetctl route show -v
wait 1s for route state change
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl show_route
CMD: onyx-155vm61.onyx.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lnetctl route show -v
 sanity-lnet test_226: @@@@@@ FAIL: Wanted "up" lctl found "down up"

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/107 - 4.18.0-553.53.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4654 - 5.14.0-570.37.1_lustre.el9.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-lnet test_226 - Wanted up lctl found down up
item.summary: interop sanity-lnet test_226: FAIL: Wanted "up" lctl found "down up"

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
